This meal plan is tailored specifically for an Australian context (ingredients easily found at Coles, Woolworths, or Aldi) and is designed to be **budget-friendly and simple**. 

Because you are a **super-taster**, I have avoided notoriously bitter vegetables (like broccoli, kale, and Brussels sprouts) and opted for naturally sweeter, milder vegetables (carrots, zucchini, capsicum, corn
